pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processor conflicts.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may fail to compile or run on JDK 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release flag for cross-compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with JDK 21 can lead to warnings or errors if the toolchain doesn't support the specific version combination; release is the standard for JDK 9+.
